reviews.review_description:
It's the game that inspired the movie. It's kind of creepy, but not really scary and it really makes you have to think / memorize.

I got this game, basically with no knowledge of what it was even really about. I haven't seen the movie yet. I tried beating the game by simply playing it and trying to memorize the different anomalies for about 2 days, but decided that it would be too hard or take too long, to memorize all of them myself and there were some that I just wasn't noticing. I watched a few YouTube videos, to get an idea of what I was missing. There are over 30 different anomalies that you have to be on the lookout for. Sometimes there will be an anomaly and sometimes there will not be. If you don't see an anomaly AKA any change in the hallway, you continue forward, if you notice something is off, you simply turn around and go the other way, which actually gets you to the next section.

I recommend that you try beating the game yourself without watching videos, just for fun and to test yourself. If you get to a point where you are ready to give up, that's what I would look on youtube, to see what anomalies you're overlooking. That's just my opinion, either way, I do recommend this game, if you are someone who likes puzzle/perceptive games.

I’d never heard about this game until I saw the movie (brilliant movie btw).
I clicked with this game immediately, it’s so easy to play yet challenging enough to keep coming back. I completed my first escape pretty quickly and took a little longer on my second attempt. The anomalies change with every session. Some are easy to identify, others are subtle. A few scares on the way too. It’s one of those games that I’ll keep coming back to. Hope there’s a sequel on the cards.

reviews.review_title: Way too easy but way too fun😭
reviews.review_description: I thought it would be really simple to beat, but it kinda wasn’t I got scared so many times and left but it’s still so fun!
Amazing game

I loved this game on computer. And I obviously loved the (amazing) movie. Not a shock that I ended up loving the VR version as well. This game is pure genius. Endless fun. And the graphics are simply amazing. Especially on Quest 3. I was left in awe the entire time. Everybody should play this gem.
I play it like twice a day every day, please do part 2, or dlc or update or something
this is mid because every time i dont see any anomaly i keep going forward and it says there was a anomaly when there wasn't

I love puzzlers that require attention to detail, and this game is the perfect balance between puzzle solving and simplicity. It took me about half an hour to beat it the first time, and I can’t wait to jump back in and replay it. A major challenge of escape the room type games is replay, and this one seems simple enough to offer unlimited anomalies to replay.

I’m not a fan of jump scares in horror games. This one got my heart rate up in a few places but was not uncomfortably. I saw where one reviewer played with her boyfriend, so I’m excited to cast it to my tv to play with friends. Strongly recommend for a well-designed yet simple puzzle game.

I hope they keep adding anomalies so they don't repeat themselves.
Definitely recommend this game .
I really want the Metro, but I love exit. It’s very interesting.

reviews.review_title: Great quality but pretty easy in VR
reviews.review_description: It’s fun but when in VR, the differences are very easy figure out for some reason.

Seriously I really hope there will be more games like this: straightforward yet surprisingly deep. Each run through the exits brings enough variety to keep things fresh. It did get a little frustrating at times when the exit reset, like we’d think we made it, only to realize we missed something. However, that just pushed us to sharpen our focus and check more carefully next time.

The game was seriously impressive. It challenged our minds and heightened our observational skills. I streamed it while my boyfriend helped watch and spot things. Definitely helpful having a second pair of eyes!

Not gonna lie, there were moments that genuinely scared me. I felt safer having him there (I’m a girly girl, okay 😅). But we had a lot of fun figuring things out together. A memorable experience all around.
This game is addictive, if they keep adding to it I'll be really happy.
I have no complaints here. It’s fun

Please,please, please make more like this 
I love the simple and frightening things in this game of spot the difference. 
I know there’s more for the computer 
We need them on VR

reviews.review_title: The Exit 8 VR is super interesting
reviews.review_description: I didn't know what to expect when I first booted up The Exit 8 VR for the first time, but as I soon started playing I found myself hooked and super interested with the game and how it works. The anomalies are well thought out and varied, which is a good thing. The game has quite realistic graphics and lighting. I also think this game is incredible value for money considering how repayable it can be. So overall, I'd recommend The Exit 8 VR.

I beat the game in 5 min, but I still come back to it because it still sends the occasional shiver down my spine. The graphics may not be as good as the PC version, but VR makes this game so enjoyable.
A good idea for a game but, i beat it 1st try i think it would be a good idea to add diffrent modes, mabye like  easy mode normal mode and hard mode and nightmare mode or a endless mode!

reviews.review_title: Bad reviews don’t know how to play
reviews.review_description:
Please read this:
This game is about finding differences in the “subway” rooms. If it’s different, turn back. Otherwise keep walking. ITS NOT JUST A WALKING SIMULATOR!! There’s so many different anomalies, when the credits roll PLAY IT AGAIN!! When you play a board game and finish it you don’t say “oh it ended to fast now it’s useless 1 star” YOU PLAY IT AGAIN!! IM TIRED OF THESE UNINFORMED PEOPLE RUINING THIS GREAT GAME!!

sidenote:
Watch Jaden Williams’ video (search “Jaden Williams EXIT 8”) for a really good playthrough, although he does show some of the anomalies it’s not very much spoiler.

sidenote x2:
There’s also PLATFORM 8 on steam which is the prequel on the train before this game.

Dear devs:
What are the new anomalies? Can’t seem to find them.
When it resets to 0 but no death (chase, blood pool, etc..) what happened?
I played it for the first time, I'm either scary good, or it's boring as f*ck. Maybe both. Id like if they did one of those replay paradox plots with this
This is the same than PC version, but it's fun because it's in VR

The exit 8 really makes you think 
Really makes you think outside of the game. Question what happens. Makes you overthink…

reviews.review_title: Fun and slight spooky on first try
reviews.review_description: The game is simple. Memorize what the hallway looks like and continue. If you see anything off or an anomaly, turn around IMMEDIATELY. This is fun and I beat on my first try (I watched videos about the original PC version when it came out) and was relatively easy if you have good memory. It's only fun for the first time you play it, but you can probably keep the game and let your friends who don't have vr try it out.
One of the best vr games
I beat this in 15 minutes.
I told my friends I’d drop a five star review if I got twins on one of the levels but I’d still rate it five stars anyways

reviews.review_title: im bad at it and i love it anyway.
reviews.review_description: i wont lie. every attempt so far ended in a defeated yell of slight anger. i have no idea what i am missing. the tunnel is so straight forward yet so tricky.  It's short, it has an eerie atmosphere but it's not scary. well worth the buy
The game was really fun the anomalies were soooooo detailed
I really enjoy this game even tho I get a little angry because it’s so hard but it’s still so fun and satisfying when you find the anomaly

I never played a game like this before, so I had no idea what to expect. 
Turns out, it's great.
It's best going in completely blind and trying to figure out stuff on your own.

The atmosphere and feeling of being in those empty spaces is a big part of the experience, so I guess VR is perfect way to play The Exit 8.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're happy to hear the VR significantly improved your experience :).

reviews.review_description: It ok
You just walk
I love it I was thinking about getting something else but I’m glad got this tho it’s scary at times, I love how some of the anomalies are hard to spot it makes it way more fun best 5 bucks spent.
Love Exit 8.  I can still miss anomalies even though I play it regularly.  Makes me pay more attention to detail.  Anxiously waiting for Platform 8 to become available.  😊
I enjoyed it, but, wow, did the hands give me a jump scare lol

Will this version of EXIT 8 get the new update with the new anomalies?

Will Platform 8 come to VR?

This is a great vr port of an already great game. Its not a horror game like residwnt evil or outlast. This game relies on making you uneasy and overthinking a ton. Its an existenial type of horror. This game perfectly encapsulates the unknown and not knowing what happens next. Great game and i hope to see the sequel here too!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're so glad you like it! We'll share your comment with the developer :)

reviews.review_description: i liked this game but it’s only getting 2 stars because it was WAY too easy. It’s so easy that I’ve beaten this more than 10 times in under an hour.
What do you do in the beginning? Stuck on first floor going in circles
An excellent game that’s easy to recommend. That being said once you ‘work it out’ it gets very frustrating to try complete and actually exit 8.
Did not know what I was getting into but had such a blast trying to Exit8

Can you please make the run/walk button like the X or A button because I have a little annoying stick drift on both controllers & my thumb hurts after playing it :( 

Also on the first hallway I always have to go backwards even if I don’t spot an anomaly and i have beaten the game a couple times, yeah the first hallway is weird. But 

Just make the thumb-stick for moving into the face buttons like X or A and keep the thumb-stick for turning, and last thing make in the setting an option to turn off the thumb-stick cause stick drift

developer_response.body: You don't have to press the stickers to run. You can use the triggers (or any other button) for that :) Check it out and let us know if it improved your experience.

reviews.review_description: I think its worth it considering the price! Would love to see some new anomalies or maps added in the future. Also fun to let friends play!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're so glad you like it! We'll share your comment with the developer :)

reviews.review_description: I went into this game with little experience and even less knowledge of the game and found myself oddly drawn to it, I’ve still not found everything even though I have seen the credits. The premise is simple but mastery will take a keen eye a good game to show off VR to your friends￼

developer_response.body: Thank you mate! We're glad you liked the game. Going into without knowing anything about The Exit 8 makes the experience really exciting indeed :)

reviews.review_description:
I recently ventured into The Exit 8 VR, expecting a relaxing stroll in an underground maze. Right off the bat, I found myself in a never ending passageway.  It was like a twisted version of “hot and cold”—but I was just getting colder!

After what felt like forever, I finally stumbled upon Exit 8, and I could almost hear the walls sigh in relief. If you’re in the mood for some giggles mixed with a dose of existential confusion, this game is perfect! Just remember: in the underground world of Exit 8, the only thing scarier than the anomalies is getting lost in your own thoughts! Happy wandering!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're happy you liked it and managed to escape from your own thoughts (and the anomalies!).

reviews.review_description:
I’ve beaten the game 3 times without having to get to 8. Far as I got was 5. And it would go back to 0 or 1 or 2.  And all of a sudden I’m at 3 and the next corner is the way up the stairs to beat the game 
So my game is definitely broken cause it’s counting completed levels as 0 or something.   Definitely needs a bug fix 

Also needs more maps and or more anomalies.  Cause game will not have lasting playability 
5 stars once the bugs get fixed

developer_response.body: That could be the false exit anomaly. If you find the exit without being in the 8th loop go back and see if you continue to the next loop. Let us know if it was that editing the review.

reviews.review_description: I liked the PC edition and it’s really cool in VR. The only downside being - motion sickness. I‘m a long time vr user so i forgot it‘s even a thing, but this game reminded me) I hope there’s a teleportation movement mode added soon to help with that.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 
We got several comments talking about teleportation movement so we're considering adding it in a future update.

reviews.review_description: I really like the game, it looks pretty cool.  I really like the challenge!  However , I would have liked if they added a snap movement for those who suffer from motion sickness!  (Please Add it) the options that are there now is not enough to prevent motion sickness!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! The game has snap turn! It should be turned on as default but if not, check on options :)

reviews.review_description:
I wrote an initial review but after the developer replied I'm happy to rewrite it. I mistakenly thought the game wasn't very smooth and I had to press the joystick to move fast. I was wrong on both, after rebooting the smoothness was there and apparently you can use the trigger to move quickly. So all good there.

The graphics are good, the idea is great and the price point is reasonable. My only small complaint is I completed it in half an hour. Maybe I got lucky but I thought it would be much harder to complete.

I'm hoping the anomalies are different for each game to improve repeatability. Also fingers crossed for some updates.

developer_response.body: Thank you for updating you review! We'll bring your comments to the dev. team and let's hope next time we reach the 5 stars!

reviews.review_description: It’s literally Exit 8, what more could one possibly long for. (To answer the developers, yes, I loved the new additions and new anomalies.)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Did you like the new additions to the VR version?

reviews.review_title: Interesting, creepy but makes me queasy
reviews.review_description:
I’ve only played for about 20 minutes so far, so haven’t completed it yet. It’s a good game that delivers on what it promises. 

However one disappointing thing is that it induces motion sickness, so I’m not sure I’m going to be able to finish it. As another reviewer said, please add snap/teleport movement (not the same thing as snap-turning! Half Life Alyx is a good example of a game that gets it right)

developer_response.body: We got several comments talking about teleport movement and we're considering it for a future update. We really appreciate players' feedback that allows us to improve the game :)

reviews.review_description: I love to make the clones drop their phones.

developer_response.body: Thank you! That was a nice addition and to be honest, we didn't expect people liked it so much but we are so glad you do!

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best liminal space/backrooms games and yes, there are room for improvements such as adding anomalies that are mire hidden or making difficulties.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We added some new content on the VR version but we'll see if we can add some extra one in the future :)

reviews.review_title: Probably need to look this game up first
reviews.review_description:
Before buying…Exit 8 is a walking sim to find anomalies…that’s it. It’s relaxing and interesting. Not much else to say

Edit: would like the click to walk fast either be click to fast walk without holding it in, or an auto fast walk feature. The constant clicking and holding down will ruin the controller over time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Relaxing is indeed a new way to describe it but we are so happy you enjoyed the experience.

reviews.review_title: More fun than you would think
reviews.review_description: I just beat it for the first time and really enjoyed it. Looking for little details was more fun than i thought it would be and I find myself looking forward to my next playthough. Another reviewer recommended adding more anomalies and multi-player and I Highly agree! More anomalies means more replayablity and I'd love for a friend to join to help find these anomalies.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Multiplayer might be a little bit too challenging but we take notes about increasing the number of anomalies for future update.

reviews.review_description:
I was able to find exit 8 on my first try. 

Very simple, not really challenging.

After playing the PC version months ago, I feel this could be improved. Such as increasing the materials normal map intensity, adding a HDRI captured from the in game scene to the maps skylight actor etc.
Those two details,, adding to the tiles realism, really had impact on the PC version but has been lost on the standalone VR version.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Well, it's standalone so some changes have to be made in that aspect, as you can expect.  We really appreciate the feedback :)

reviews.review_description:
Honestly I didn’t understand at the beginning the hype with this game…

When I checked the price and I saw £5 I was intrigued so I bought it and start playing. I must admit it’s really amazing, I can add it to my favourite games list .

The best £5 spent lately.

Cons : the developers should create more levels, with different environments

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and your feedback for future updates! We'll bring it to the dev team.

reviews.review_title: Fun game but sadly broken right now
reviews.review_description: You cant actually beat the game. I beat the final loop (The sign said 8) but it didn't end, but a new loop (that still said 8) appeared. I beat the final loop a few more times (all of them with the 8 sign) and it never let me exit through the stairway as seen in the original game.

reviews.review_title: Incredible Experience With A lil Horror
reviews.review_description: I went into this game knowing nothing of the flatscreen version and I am glad I didn't. The game can be short or long depending on how good you are at observing and how much you can tolerate a little creepiness.  Graphically it looked beautiful on my Quest 3 and the sound design was perfect. I loved the "homages" I saw but I wont spoil it. My only con is that I wanted more stuff to happen but just trying to get through the game kept me entertained for hours. I did end up finishing the game after lots of frustration and there isn't much replayability after that but for the price it's more than okay.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Some people do "speed runs" gameplays to clear as soon as possible as a way to replay the game. Did you find all the anomalies? Some of them are quite subtle.

reviews.review_description: Add more maps and events

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 starts. Maps might be a little bit complicated as it'd change the concept of the game but we'll keep your comment in mind for future updates.

reviews.review_description: Like I said it’s pretty fun, wish several anomalies could happen and there could be interactive anomalies

developer_response.body: Thanks for you review! We'll take notes from your feedback :D

reviews.review_description: I bought this game on my phone but it is not showing up on my headset (quest 2). Can anyone help
I was playing and got chased by black men I rilley terrified and wanted poop 💩 my pants

developer_response.body: We literally don't know what to reply to this comment but we're glad you liked it :)

reviews.review_description: Yay!~

developer_response.body: Yeaaaah! (Thank you for the review ;))

reviews.review_description: The games good cause I like it

developer_response.body: 100% agree! Thank you for your comment, we're glad you liked the game :)

reviews.review_description:
Pretty sure this is currently broken.

First play through i took my time and go all the way to it saying EXIT 8, then it just continued, i got another 4 right and i never could actually exit and complete a run.

In the end i turned it off.

Im pretty sure the flat version ended at exit 8 and then you could start a new run, otherwise its just a walking forward and backwards simulator until you get bored.

Update reply -

I went the correct way 4 times at exit 8 and everytime it was exit 8 still. If i had gone the wrong way i assumed it should of went back to 0.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your comment.
When you exit through the "exit 8" the game ends and show the credits. Maybe there was a subtle anomaly you missed in the last loop so it brought you back to 0? Please, try again and let us know if it keeps happening to you. If it's a bug, we'll work on solving it asap.

reviews.review_description: It was definitely worth the money just wish there was more to the game. It gave me goose bumps with some of the stuff that happened. 10/10 just like the game is on pc!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice words! We're so glad you enjoyed the game :)

reviews.review_description: This game is unbelievably fun and hard, and owner, I was wondering if you could like add new maps it would be great. It got a little scary tho because the guy started chasing me and got me and then I had to restart, this is one of my favorite games on vr!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're so glad you liked the game :D We'll bring your feedback to the dev team!

reviews.review_title: Just like a Japanese subway system
reviews.review_description: Lots of fun, a lot of the anomalies had me scratching my brain. If you haven't experienced this before, I'd highly recommend it as it's unlike anything else.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We'll share your nice message with the developer!

reviews.review_description: I got every anomaly hard to spot ones to easy ones

developer_response.body: All of them! Great job! We're happy you liked the game :) and thank you for your review!

reviews.review_title: I like it so far some bugs
reviews.review_description: I can’t find the exit signs to tell you if there was a anomaly and no anomalies or anything else

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! There no sign saying that but if you went straight and went back to "0" it means there was an anomaly and you missed it.

reviews.review_description: Great game it was creepy and the anomaly’s where not to hard to find but not to easy I like how the anomalies where creepy but still managed to be well hidden very fun I just wish it was a bit longer other then that great game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice words! We're glad you enjoyed the game :)

reviews.review_description: Good value for the price def a must have

developer_response.body: Thank you for the nice words! We're so glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description:
Just beat this game within less than 30 mins. It's a great title, and honestly, for the money you pay for it, it's a great "party" title to show others new to VR and to give yourself a little terror in your guts.

It's very short, with no real new features when you start. Just choose your turning preference and start walking. You can use your hands to smack the businessman's phone out of his hand, make him bend over and slap his 🍑, and you can provoke the anomalies. You might miss a few subtle changes, but beyond a penalty of starting a Exit 0, don't think of any real punishment. 

Great game in my opinion, and what you pay for is what you get. No issues. As much as I would refund the game after beating it, I think it defeats the purpose of just playing it once. I'll definitely keep this around!

Enjoy, and may you exit safely... 🙂🫠

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Try using The Exit 8 VR to introduce some people to VR and let us know their experience ;)

reviews.review_title: Spot the difference with a twist
reviews.review_description:
Oh this game is really something! It’s short when the anomalies are obvious but can be long if they are subtle. I enjoyed playing this a lot! I hope the devs can add other “stations” with a different set of anomalies for more variety (although the game by itself has a lot of randomized combinations already, in the long run, it might get a bit repetitive). Good job guys! Looking forward to more of your games in the future 😊

P.S. Having an autorun setting would be a great help!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! The game is being a huge success so expect more things coming in the future! :D

reviews.review_description: It's billed as a horror game... But really it's a game about noticing.

developer_response.body: Noticing creepy stuff! We're glad you liked it, thank you for you review :)

reviews.review_description: Cool concept, only did two runs for now. I got through  all the exits pretty easy, with nothing too crazy. Then when doing another run it gave other anomalies, some which we're surprising. Makes me wonder how many different anomalies there will be before you've seen em all

developer_response.body: We're glad you liked the game! There's a pretty decent amount of anomalies. We won't give the exact number but most probably a couple of runs aren't covering all of them ;)

reviews.review_title: Excellent value, it melted my brain
reviews.review_description:
I started playing and I didnt have a clue what I was doing. I spent an hour and a half and got completely lost.

Some of the anomalies are so hard to spot! But once you become familiar with the space, it gets a bit easier. However, the game gets harder the longer you play.

I had to reset my game data and start from scratch because I wasnt making any progress. Once I did this I finished the game in 15 min. Some people will finish in 15 min some people may never finish!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice words! We're glad you liked the game.

reviews.review_description: It's literally Exit 8 in VR. What more can you ask for? Great game for It's low price.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice words! Don't forget to recommend it to your friends ^^
